WpBuilder.title: WordPress sites
WpBuilder.subtitle: Spin up a fully managed WordPress install in minutes.
WpBuilder.noSites: No sites yet — create your first one above.
WpBuilder.deleteConfirm: Delete "{slug}"? This stops its Docker stack, deletes site files on the server, removes the Cloudflare DNS record, and cannot be undone.
WpBuilder.pollTimedOut: One or more sites have been provisioning for over 15 minutes. Check server logs — a site may be stuck.

errors.quotaRange: Quota must be between 1 and 500 GB.

success.created: Provisioning started. Watch the status below — admin credentials are emailed when ready.
